titleStmt.title: SII 29.139: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 139. (A.R. No. B. 624 of 1961-62.) KHAMBADA KŌṆE COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Another slab in the same field called Kallu-toḍame.

This seems to be a replica of the previous [No. 138] record. The king, the governor, the grant, the donor, the purpose of the grant and the date-all being the same as in the previous record. The only difference we find here is the recipient and the amount of the grant. The amount was 60 dod[ḍ]a varaha gadyāṇas equivalent of 150 Kāṭi-gadyāṇa and it was given to Vīrasēna-dēvācharya of Penugoṁḍe. Bārakūru karaṇika Mallarasa wrote this record.
The date of this record is as in No. 138 i.e., 1516 A.D., December 9, [Tuesday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
la staṁbhāya śaṁbhave . svasti jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1438
saṁdu voṁbhattaneya vartamāna dhātu saṁvatsarada mārgaśira śu 15 lū śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīra kṛṣṇarāya
mahārāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi su
kha saṁkathā vinōdadiṁda duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipālaneyāgi saka
lavaṁrnna darṁmāśramavanū pratipālisuva kāladalū Ā rāya
ra nirūpadiṁda bārakūra rājyavanū ratnappa voḍeyara kumā
ra vijayappa voḍeyaru pratipālisuva kāladalū Ā
kriṣṇarāya mahārāyarige śatrukṣaya mitrārjita Ā
yurārōgya Ayiśvaryyābhivridhi yāgabēkeṁdu Ā vijaThe letter A is written above the line.
yappa voḍeyaru penuguṁḍiya vīrasēnadēvācāryya
rige dharṁmavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu barasikoṭṭaṁthā śā
sanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma Aramaneya bhaṁḍārastaḷada
keṟagāla grāmada voḷagaṇa kaṁbhada kōṇeya Ūravo
ḷage naṁmma Aramanege tettu baha sidhāyada hoṁnina vo
ḷage vīrasēna dēvācāryyarige kaḷava kaḍidu dhāreya neṟa
du koṭṭadu kāṭiga 150 kaṁ doḍavaraha gadyāṇa ga 60 A
kṣāradalū varaha gadyāṇa Aṟuvattu varahanū sarvamā
nyavāgi kuḷava kaḍidu dhāreya neṟadu koṭṭeU yī hoṁnanu
nimma śiṣya pāraṁpareyāgi Ā caṁdrārkkastāyigaḷāgiyū
Aṟuvattu varahanu ya kuḷava kaḍidu koṭṭeU
Anubhavisi bahiriyeṁdu vijayappa voḍeyaru vīrasēna
dēvācāryyarige sahiraṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvakavāgi
dhāreyaneṟadu barasikoṭṭa dharṁma śāsana . yī śāsa
nakke vopa nāraṇa hebāra sōmanātha
hebāra ti dēvaru kaṁbada kōṇe gōyiṁda
hebārara voppa gōviṁda dēvaru bārakūra karaṇika mallara
sara baraha vijayappa voḍeyara vopa. śrī vītarāga . yī dharmma
kke Ārobaru Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyalu [nūṟa Eṁbhatu]
kavileya koṁda dōṣakke hōharu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 29.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
